title: PHP / Laravel
description: Conventional commits + scope-enum hinting common Laravel areas (app, config, database, routes, resources, tests). Hook wiring is left to captainhook or a manual .git/hooks/commit-msg script.

files.content:
# Commit lint (PHP / Laravel)

## Install dev deps

```
npm install --save-dev @commitlint/cli @commitlint/config-conventional
```

## Wire a commit-msg hook

Pick ONE:

### A) Manual git hook

```
cat > .git/hooks/commit-msg <<'SH'
#!/bin/sh
npx --no -- commitlint --edit "$1"
SH
chmod +x .git/hooks/commit-msg
```

### B) CaptainHook (PHP-native)

```
composer require --dev captainhook/captainhook captainhook/plugin-composer
vendor/bin/captainhook install
```

Then edit `captainhook.json`:

```json
{
  "commit-msg": {
    "enabled": true,
    "actions": [
      { "action": "npx --no -- commitlint --edit {$ARG}" }
    ]
  }
}
```
